documents.name: Aadhaar Card
documents.description: 12-digit unique identity number issued by UIDAI
documents.how_to_get: Visit nearest Aadhaar Enrolment Centre or uidai.gov.in

documents.name: BPL Ration Card
documents.description: Below Poverty Line ration card issued by state government
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest Food & Civil Supplies office or tehsil

documents.name: Land ownership records (Khasra / Khatauni)
documents.description: Official land ownership document issued by state revenue department
documents.how_to_get: Visit nearest tehsil or patwari office, or check on state Bhulekh portal

documents.name: Bank passbook (with IFSC code)
documents.description: Savings account passbook showing account number and IFSC code
documents.how_to_get: Open account at any bank branch (use PMJDY for zero-balance account)

documents.name: Caste certificate
documents.description: Official certificate proving SC/ST/OBC category, issued by SDM or tehsil
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest tehsil or SDM office, or via state e-services portal

documents.name: Income certificate (issued by tehsil)
documents.description: Certificate showing annual family income, issued by Revenue Officer / SDM
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest tehsil or Jansuvidha Kendra

documents.name: Passport-size photo
documents.description: Recent passport-size photograph
documents.how_to_get: Any photo studio or Aadhaar centre

documents.name: Mobile number linked to Aadhaar
documents.description: Mobile number registered with Aadhaar (needed for OTP verification)
documents.how_to_get: Visit Aadhaar centre to link mobile, or update at uidai.gov.in

documents.name: Disability certificate (UDID card)
documents.description: Unique Disability ID card certifying type and percentage of disability
documents.how_to_get: Apply at swavlambancard.gov.in or District Disability Rehabilitation Centre

documents.name: Birth certificate of child
documents.description: Official birth certificate issued by municipal/gram panchayat authority
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest municipal office or gram panchayat

documents.name: Death certificate of husband
documents.description: Official death certificate issued by municipal/gram panchayat
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest municipal office or gram panchayat

documents.name: Antenatal Care (ANC) card from nearest PHC/ASHA worker
documents.description: Pregnancy registration card issued at Primary Health Centre
documents.how_to_get: Visit nearest ASHA worker or Primary Health Centre (PHC)

documents.name: Mother and Child Protection Card
documents.description: Health record card for mother and child issued at PHC
documents.how_to_get: Issued at Primary Health Centre during first antenatal visit

documents.name: Previous year marksheet
documents.description: Mark sheet / result of the previous academic year
documents.how_to_get: Obtained from school or college

documents.name: Bonafide student certificate from school/college
documents.description: Certificate from current institution confirming student is enrolled
documents.how_to_get: Request from school/college office — usually issued in 1-2 days

documents.name: Voter ID Card
documents.description: Voter Identity Card issued by Election Commission of India
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nvsp.in or nearest ERO office

documents.name: PAN Card
documents.description: Permanent Account Number card issued by Income Tax Department
documents.how_to_get: Apply at incometax.gov.in or nearest NSDL/UTI centre

documents.name: Detailed Project Report (DPR)
documents.description: Business plan with cost breakdown for loan/subsidy applications
documents.how_to_get: Prepare yourself or with help from District Industries Centre (DIC)

documents.name: Age proof
documents.description: Document proving age — Aadhaar, birth certificate, or school certificate
documents.how_to_get: Aadhaar itself serves as age proof in most cases

documents.name: Self-declaration that no LPG connection exists at home
documents.description: A simple written declaration that no LPG gas connection exists in the household
documents.how_to_get: Write on plain paper and get it signed — no official stamp needed

documents.name: NREGA Job Card
documents.description: Job card issued under MGNREGA scheme by Gram Panchayat
documents.how_to_get: Apply at nearest Gram Panchayat office

documents.name: Proof of rural residence (Ration Card or Voter ID)
documents.description: Document proving residence in a rural area
documents.how_to_get: Ration card or Voter ID with village address
